options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: death_link_amnesty
options.description: How many deaths it takes to send a DeathLink

options.name: trap_link
options.description:
Whether your received traps are linked to other players

You will also receive any linked traps from other players with Trap Link enabled,
if you have a weight above "none" set for that trap

options.name: goal_area
options.description: What Area must be cleared to gain access to the Epilogue and complete the game

options.name: lock_goal_area
options.description: Determines whether your Goal Area will be locked until you receive your required Strawberries, or only the Epilogue

options.name: goal_area_checkpointsanity
options.description: Determines whether the Checkpoints in your Goal Area will be shuffled into the item pool (if Checkpointsanity is active)

options.name: total_strawberries
options.description: Maximum number of how many Strawberries can exist

options.name: strawberries_required_percentage
options.description: Percentage of existing Strawberries you must receive to access your Goal Area (if Lock Goal Area is active) and the Epilogue

options.name: checkpointsanity
options.description: Determines whether Checkpoints will be shuffled into the item pool

options.name: binosanity
options.description: Determines whether using Binoculars sends location checks

options.name: keysanity
options.description: Determines whether individual Keys are shuffled into the item pool

options.name: gemsanity
options.description: Determines whether Summit Gems are shuffled into the item pool

options.name: carsanity
options.description: Determines whether riding on cars grants location checks

options.name: roomsanity
options.description: Determines whether entering individual rooms sends location checks

options.name: include_goldens
options.description: Determines whether collecting Golden Strawberries sends location checks

options.name: include_core
options.description: Determines whether Chapter 8 - Core Levels will be included

options.name: include_farewell
options.description: Determines how much of Chapter 9 - Farewell Level will be included

options.name: include_b_sides
options.description: Determines whether the B-Side Levels will be included

options.name: include_c_sides
options.description: Determines whether the C-Side Levels will be included

options.name: junk_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of non-required Strawberries in the item pool with junk items

options.name: trap_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps

options.name: trap_expiration_action
options.description: The type of action which causes traps to wear off

options.name: trap_expiration_amount
options.description: The amount of the selected Trap Expiration Action that must occur for the trap to wear off

options.name: bald_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes Maddy bald

options.name: literature_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the player to read literature

options.name: stun_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which briefly stuns Maddy

options.name: invisible_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which turns Maddy invisible

options.name: fast_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which increases the game speed

options.name: slow_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which decreases the game speed

options.name: ice_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the level to become slippery

options.name: reverse_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the controls to be reversed

options.name: screen_flip_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the screen to be flipped

options.name: laughter_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes Maddy to laugh uncontrollably

options.name: hiccup_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes Maddy to hiccup uncontrollably

options.name: zoom_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the camera to focus on Maddy

options.name: music_shuffle
options.description:
Music shuffle type

None: No Music is shuffled

Consistent: Each music track is consistently shuffled throughout the game

Singularity: The entire game uses one song for levels

options.name: require_cassettes
options.description: Determines whether you must receive a level's Cassette Item to hear that level's music

options.name: madeline_hair_length
options.description: How long Madeline's hair is

options.name: madeline_one_dash_hair_color
options.description:
What color Madeline's hair is when she has one dash
The `any_color` option will choose a fully random color
A custom color entry may be supplied as a 6-character RGB hex color code
e.g. F542C8

options.name: madeline_two_dash_hair_color
options.description:
What color Madeline's hair is when she has two dashes
The `any_color` option will choose a fully random color
A custom color entry may be supplied as a 6-character RGB hex color code
e.g. F542C8

options.name: madeline_no_dash_hair_color
options.description:
What color Madeline's hair is when she has no dashes
The `any_color` option will choose a fully random color
A custom color entry may be supplied as a 6-character RGB hex color code
e.g. F542C8

options.name: madeline_feather_hair_color
options.description:
What color Madeline's hair is when she has a feather
The `any_color` option will choose a fully random color
A custom color entry may be supplied as a 6-character RGB hex color code
e.g. F542C8
